headline: CFO Change and Missile Solutions IPO Focus Might Change The Case For Investing In L3Harris (LHX)
summary: In early March 2026, L3Harris Technologies appointed Kenneth (Ken) Sharp as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, while former CFO Kenneth (Ken) Bedingfield shifted to focus fully on leading the Missile Solutions segment and preparing it for an eventual initial public offering. This reshuffle concentrates experienced financial leadership on both the group level and the missile business, highlighting how seriously L3Harris is treating the planned Missile Solutions spin-off and...
